title: Popover
description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button. Supports forms, headers, and alignment control.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the Radix UI popover primitive.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the popover component code.

usage.import: import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent, PopoverHeader, PopoverTitle, PopoverDescription } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic popover with simple text content.

examples.title: With Header
examples.description: A popover with a title and description header.
examples.code:
import { Button, Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent, PopoverHeader, PopoverTitle, PopoverDescription, } from "@repo/components"; export default function PopoverWithHeader() { return ( What is a Popover? A popover displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

Use it to show extra details without cluttering the main UI.

); }

examples.title: With Form
examples.description: A popover containing an editable form.

examples.title: Alignments
examples.description: Control horizontal alignment with the align prop: start, center, or end.
